description: Build the admin/moderation dashboard, payment/escrow system architecture, anti-fraud/security systems, and deployment configuration. Complete the platform with trust & safety features.
steps: Create src/features/admin/components/admin-sidebar.tsx - admin navigation: Dashboard, Users, Verifications, Products, Orders, Fraud Monitoring, Reports, Moderation Logs, Financial, Settings. Different from buyer/seller dashboard.
Create src/features/admin/components/admin-stats.tsx - admin overview stats: Total Users, Pending Verifications, Active Disputes, Revenue Today, Fraud Alerts, Active Listings

Create src/features/admin/components/user-management-table.tsx - admin user table with: avatar, name, email, role badge, verification status, trust score, actions (view, ban, warn, change role). Pagination and search.

Create src/features/admin/components/verification-queue.tsx - KYC verification queue: user info, submitted documents (ID, selfie), submission date, approve/reject buttons with reason field, 24hr minimum wait indicator

Create src/features/admin/components/fraud-dashboard.tsx - fraud monitoring: risk score alerts, suspicious activity feed, device fingerprint conflicts, multi-account detection alerts, action buttons (investigate, ban, clear)
Create src/features/admin/components/moderation-panel.tsx - content moderation: reported products/users list, report reason, evidence, moderator actions (remove, warn, ban), moderation history log
Create src/features/admin/components/financial-dashboard.tsx - financial overview: total revenue chart placeholder, commission earned, pending payouts, escrow balance, withdrawal requests queue
Create src/app/admin/page.tsx - admin dashboard overview
Create src/app/admin/users/page.tsx - user management page
Create src/app/admin/verifications/page.tsx - verification queue page
Create src/app/admin/fraud/page.tsx - fraud monitoring page
Create src/app/admin/moderation/page.tsx - moderation page
Create src/app/admin/financial/page.tsx - financial dashboard page
Create src/app/admin/layout.tsx - admin layout with admin sidebar, restricted to ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN roles

Create src/services/escrow-service.ts - escrow system service layer: createEscrow(), holdFunds(), releaseFunds(), initiateDispute(), processRefund(), calculateCommission(). Type-safe interfaces for the full escrow lifecycle.
Create src/services/payment-service.ts - payment service abstraction: processPayment(), createPaymentIntent(), verifyWebhook(), getPaymentMethods(). Supports Stripe and PayPal method types.
Create src/services/fraud-service.ts - fraud detection service: calculateRiskScore(), checkDeviceFingerprint(), detectMultiAccount(), flagSuspiciousActivity(), getfraudAlerts()
Create src/services/notification-service.ts - notification service: sendNotification(), markAsRead(), getUserNotifications(), sendEmailNotification() templates
Create src/lib/security/rate-limiter.ts - rate limiting utility using in-memory token bucket (configurable per endpoint), with types for RateLimitConfig and RateLimitResult
Create src/lib/security/device-fingerprint.ts - device fingerprinting utility: generateFingerprint() from user agent, screen, timezone, language; compareFingerprints() for similarity scoring
Create src/lib/security/ip-monitor.ts - IP monitoring utility: trackLogin(), detectSuspiciousPattern(), getLoginHistory(), flagNewDevice()
Create src/lib/security/captcha.ts - CAPTCHA integration helper with verification function (supports hCaptcha/reCAPTCHA)
Create src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts - Stripe webhook handler route (POST) with signature verification, event routing for payment_intent.succeeded, payment_intent.failed, etc.
Create src/app/api/webhooks/paypal/route.ts - PayPal webhook handler route with signature verification
Create vercel.json with deployment configuration: regions, environment variable references, headers (security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options), rewrites if needed

Create .env.example updated with all environment variables: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID, PAYPAL_SECRET, HCAPTCHA_SECRET, NEXT_PUBLIC_HCAPTCHA_SITE_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
Create src/middleware.ts update - add rate limiting headers, security headers, admin route protection, seller route protection based on role checks
acceptance_criteria: pnpm build succeeds with all admin and security components
Admin dashboard has all required pages accessible from sidebar
Escrow service has complete lifecycle methods with proper TypeScript types
Payment service abstracts multiple providers behind a unified interface
Fraud service has risk scoring and detection utilities
Rate limiter is configurable per endpoint
Middleware properly gates admin and seller routes
